# Arti Studio

> Arti Studio is an Oradea-based custom-furniture studio. We design and build bespoke kitchens, dressings, bedrooms, living rooms, and bathrooms — combining personalised design, precise execution, and transparent communication.

## Services
- 3D Design & Planning: Photorealistic renders and technical drawings before production
- Measurements & Consulting: On-site millimetre measurements, ergonomics, and storage advice
- In-house production: Cutting, edge banding, assembly, and QC in our workshop
- Installation & Finishing: Turnkey installation, fine adjustments, integrated lighting
- Premium hardware & materials: Blum / Hettich hinges, soft-close, push-to-open, quartz worktops
- Warranty & Support: Workmanship warranty and post-install support

## Portfolio Categories
- Bucătărie (Kitchen)
- Living
- Dormitor (Bedroom)
- Dressing
- Baie (Bathroom)

## Products
- Daily Cleaner pentru mobilier — pH-neutral daily cleaner
- Anti-Fingerprint Cleaner — removes smudges from matte and gloss surfaces
- Furniture Protector — invisible scratch and stain protection
- Leather & Vinyl Cleaner — feeds and protects upholstery
- Nano-Coating Protecție invizibilă — nano-tech long-term shield

## Key Facts
- Founded: 2018
- Workshops & partners: 2
- Projects delivered: 10+
- Cities served: 3+
- Default language: Romanian (RO). Site available in 14 languages, 12 awaiting translation.
